text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Phew... Well, I guess that's it for today, then?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to the laboratory now. And speaking of
preparations for tomorrow's experiment, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh look, it's Ayabe. Are you about to begin
training?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Isn't that obvious?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm... I see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've decided, Trainer! I'm going to continue
training!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Together with Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Together? I never said I wanted to train with you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, pay me no mind. I'm just going to run with
you, no big deal!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...You're Tachyon's trainer, right? Aren't you
going to stop her?
choice_data_list: Humor her a little, will you?
I'll go talk her out of it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Nice decision. I do what I want, after all!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What about what I want?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I finally have the chance to observe Ayabe run
from up close.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you even listening?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Come on, don't be shy! Run as fast as you can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon refuses to leave Admire Vega
alone and decides to stick around for some extra
"training."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What's that? You don't even have the right to—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...She's gone. And here I thought I could carefully
observe her close up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's all your fault, Trainer! You owe me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Agnes Tachyon's complaints, we
successfully complete the day's training.
